calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Mar-17-2009 Off Calendar

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-08-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Elliott Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, Dept. 525

CASES 826211 & 826213 ARE RELATED AND ARE HEARD TOGETHER:
9:35am
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant Hong Tac Siu, who is the same appellant in both cases, appears through counsel, Gary N. Chen; Respondents, Zhe Rui He (#826211) and Gui Zhen Liu (#82623), both appear in Pro Per. Both Respondents are present with a certified Cantonese Interpreter, Tom Lam, who interprets for them.
Respondents Zhe Rui He & Gui Zhen Liu both, respectively, present their cases in the narrative with translation provided by Mr. Lam.
EXH(R)1 Respondent's prepared statement
EXH(R)2 Respondent's color Xerox pictures of injuries
EXH(R)3 Copy of papers from Community Health Network
EXH(R)4 Copy of "outpatient request" from Community Health Network
EXH(R)5 Copy of 11/01/07 incident report
EXH(R)6 Copy of 6/27/08 restraining order
10:20am
Court takes a brief break
10:30am
Court reconvenes, all present. Mr. Chen begins cross-examination.
EXH(A)A Declaration and Statement in Support of Appeal
11:20am
Parties waive closing arguments, but make verbal statements to the Court.
11:35am
Both matters are submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-20-2008 Judgment Entered
